channel_thesis: The founder has strong ecommerce workflow knowledge but weak direct buyer access and no audience, so the first channel should borrow trust and access from intermediaries. A partner path through agencies, fractional operators, and merchant-facing service providers is the fastest realistic route to signal because it matches existing trust relationships and can generate merchant introductions without requiring broad brand awareness.
primary_channel: Partner or reseller path through ecommerce agencies, fractional operators, and adjacent merchant service providers.
supporting_channels: Narrow outbound to a curated list of agencies, consultants, and service firms serving ecommerce merchants.
Niche community and newsletter placements aimed at operators and agencies to build credibility with partners.
Lightweight marketplace, directory, or partner page presence to support trust after introductions.
assets_needed: One-page partner brief with merchant pain, workflow fit, and pilot terms.
Partner-specific demo showing reporting workflow value.
Partner landing page with use cases and pilot CTA.
Pilot onboarding checklist for introduced merchants.
Proof-point capture template for testimonials and outcomes.
CRM tracker for partner pipeline and pilot status.
sequence: Build a list of 40 target partners in one narrow segment such as Shopify-focused agencies and fractional operators.
Create a concise partner brief and partner-specific demo.
Run direct outreach to book discovery calls with partners rather than merchants.
Convert 5 to 8 partners into active pilot discussions.
Ask interested partners for 1 to 3 merchant introductions or a white-glove pilot.
Run merchant pilots, capture proof points, and refine the partner pitch.
Expand to the next partner segment only after repeatable introductions or conversions appear.
success_metrics: 40 target partners contacted in the first sprint.
At least 20% meeting rate from contacted partners.
At least 3 partners willing to introduce merchants or run a pilot.
At least 3 merchant pilots started from partner access.
At least 1 pilot converts to paid usage or has a clear committed expansion path.
kill_criteria: Under 10% partner reply rate after 40 highly relevant outreaches.
Fewer than 3 partner meetings after the first 40 outreaches.
Zero merchant introductions after 5 quality partner conversations.
No repeatable partner willingness to introduce additional merchants after initial pilots.
No credible path to paid conversion after 3 merchant pilots.
